scripts.test: bun run audit:arch && bun run audit:arch:rust && bun run bdd:lint && bun run bdd:test && bun run --filter astropress test
scripts.test:cli:smoke: cargo test doctor_ --manifest-path crates/astropress-cli/Cargo.toml && cargo test parses_top_level_commands --manifest-path crates/astropress-cli/Cargo.toml && cargo test deploy_target_prefers_explicit_env_target --manifest-path crates/astropress-cli/Cargo.toml && cargo test bootstraps_and_verifies_content_services --manifest-path crates/astropress-cli/Cargo.toml
scripts.test:prepush: bun run audit:arch && bun run audit:arch:rust && bun run bdd:lint && bun run docs:api:check && bun run --filter astropress test tests/runtime-env.test.ts tests/runtime-admin-auth.test.ts tests/cloudflare-adapter-security.test.ts tests/project-env.test.ts tests/content-services-ops.test.ts tests/hosted-provider.contract.test.ts tests/provider-targets.test.ts && bun run test:cli:smoke && bun run test:example && bun run repo:clean
scripts.build:example:clean: bun run tooling/scripts/run-with-temp-data.ts bun run --filter astropress-example-gh-pages build
scripts.check:example:clean: bun run tooling/scripts/run-with-temp-data.ts bun run --filter astropress-example-gh-pages check
scripts.check:admin-harness:clean: bun run tooling/scripts/run-with-temp-data.ts bun run --filter astropress-example-admin-harness check
scripts.test:accessibility: bun run build:example:clean && bun run tooling/scripts/accessibility-audit.ts examples/github-pages/dist
scripts.test:static-site: bun run build:example:clean && bun run tooling/scripts/static-site-audit.ts examples/github-pages/dist
scripts.audit:carbon: bunx size-limit --config tooling/size-limit.json && bun run tooling/scripts/carbon-audit.ts --domains-only
